auth-jwt.description: JWT/JWKS auth — run 'go run ./jwt' first, copy the printed token

auth-scopes.description: Scope enforcement — run 'go run ./scopes' first, copy a token

auth-session-binding.description: Session hijacking prevention — run 'go run ./session-binding' first

auth-public-discovery.description: Pre-auth discovery — tools/list works without token, tools/call requires JWT
